generated_oml:
instance PhysicalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor monitoring the Physical Twin over time"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmission
]

instance SensorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalSensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor data collected from physical sensors over time"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SupervisoryController
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric model representing physical dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SupervisoryController
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SupervisoryController
]

instance CyberPhysicalKnowledgeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical knowledge model integrating physical and computational aspects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SupervisoryController
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm updating models with parameter estimates from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm processing sensor data and models to identify faults"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller for automated system adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimator for system health assessment using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizer for operational efficiency and performance optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service predicting Physical Twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalOptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for safety and operational optimality"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for enhancing operational efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalOptimizationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection service identifying system faults"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultConditionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service assessing system health"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control service for automated adjustments to Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustmentAction
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on system safety status from monitoring and state estimation"
]

instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on operational optimization opportunities"
]

instance FaultConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on detected fault conditions"
]

instance AdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment action to Physical Twin based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
